claims.summary: Unsupported telemetry or transient transport failure should preserve the last valid sample and expose the mismatch.
claims.disposition: verify last-valid retention, major-version mismatch, and health projection tests

claims.summary: Pressure velocity and pressure level are different signals and must not be collapsed.
claims.disposition: verify rolling pressure-level, velocity, and cadence evidence as separate fields

claims.summary: Reconnect, ping/pong, packet age, and cadence reveal transport health without defining subjective experience.
claims.disposition: verify reconnect and cadence fixtures with explicit non-subjective semantics

claims.summary: Changing buffering, timing, dispatch, or controller response from these observations alters live transport or control behavior.
